acceptance_criteria: validate_generated_artifact returns {ok: True} for valid artifacts
Returns blocked state (exit_code=1) when artifact missing or empty
Gates LLM output before success event append to ledger
quality_guards: Deterministic validation gates prevent invalid artifacts in ledger
Blocked state reasons are stable and deterministic
No mutation of files or ledger on validation failure
diff: +   validate_generated_artifact function +   4 integration tests for artifact validation
